attributes.description: Alerts when gp2 burst balance falls below a percentage floor. Depleted burst credits throttle IOPS and typically precede disk queue depth and latency spikes.
attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] Burst balance low

investigation_guide.blob:
## Burst Balance Low

### Triage
1. This metric applies to gp2 storage volumes only — confirm storage type in the RDS console.
2. Check `ReadIOPS`/`WriteIOPS` for sustained high I/O that depleted burst credits.
3. Watch `DiskQueueDepth` and latency metrics for downstream impact.

### Mitigation
- Reduce I/O load temporarily to allow burst credits to recover.
- Migrate to gp3 or provisioned IOPS storage for predictable performance.
- Increase baseline IOPS allocation on gp2.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/RDS"
    AND MetricName == "BurstBalance"
    AND stat == "Average"
| STATS min_burst_balance = MIN(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/BurstBalance`)
    BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region
// Percent of burst credits remaining — adjust floor (default: 20%)
| WHERE min_burst_balance < 20.0
| SORT min_burst_balance ASC
